name: •Old Mortis•
description: Remodel Mortis — Tall and elegant, like a shadow come to life among the people. His dark hair, with a faint silver sheen, always accentuates his stern profile. His eyes appear cold and distant, but upon closer inspection, one can see warmth and deep tenderness in them. In everyday clothing, he chooses dark tones, but when he allows himself to relax, he can shed his armor and remain in a light, almost casual shirt, making him less intimidating. (He has a younger sister - Moty. I'll create it later)
creator: Nurik0810
